item.confluence.necromantic_scroll.info: Can be found in End City chests.
item.confluence.pygmy_necklace.info: Can be found in Jungle Temple chests.
item.confluence.hercules_beetle.info: Can be found in Nether Fortress chests.
tooltip.mine_fargo.chaos_stone.text: Mana afflictions no longer reduce Iron Magic damage, but are regarded as §4-2.0§9 natural health regeneration during effects
tooltip.mine_fargo.chaos_stone.ars_text: [Magic Source Expansion] Mana afflictions no longer reduce Iron Magic damage, regarded as §4-2.0§9 natural health regeneration during effects (not stacking with mana sickness)
item.confluence.chaos_stone.info: It definitely drops from the Ender Dragon.
tooltip.mine_fargo.mana_polarizer.text: Restores [damage amount 10%] health when dealing vanilla magic damage
tooltip.mine_fargo.mana_polarizer.iron_t: Restores [current mana percentage * damage amount 10%] health when dealing iron magic spell damage
tooltip.mine_fargo.mana_polarizer.ars_te: Restores [current mana source percentage * damage amount 10%] health when dealing magic rune damage
tooltip.mine_fargo.mana_polarizer.toolti: When installed with §eIron Magic/Nova Magic§f, if current §eMana/Mana Source both exceed 50%%§f, counts as §4-0.3§9 natural health regeneration
item.mine_fargo.the_community: Unity Heart of the Origin Stone
tooltip.mine_fargo.the_community.text: Slight attribute boosts for all properties, increasing as game progresses
tooltip.mine_fargo.the_community.text_2: Under default settings, each elite enemy/BOSS kill increases [0.25%% critical chance + 0.5%% melee/magic/ranged damage + 0.25%% summon damage + 0.5%% max health + 0.25%% damage reduction + 0.5%% armor + 1%% movement speed + 0.03%% natural life regeneration]
tooltip.mine_fargo.iron_mana_flower.text:
§eWhen health is below§950§9%%§e, automatically consumes §9Arcane Source§e in inventory, restores §925 mana§9+§95§9%%§9 max mana, but gains 5s of §9mana sickness§e
§e(Mana Sickness — reduces §925§9%%§e Iron Magic spell damage)
tooltip.mine_fargo.the_community.text_co: Current number of elite enemies defeated: §e%s
tooltip.mine_fargo.the_community.text_ma: Unity Heart of the Origin Stone has reached its peak power
death.attack.truedamage: %1$s's life has fully sublimated into magic.
tooltip.mine_fargo.bewitching_table.text: Right-click to gain 10 minutes of [Enchanted] status, increasing summon damage by 5%%
item.confluence.bewitching_table.info: It has a chance to drop when the Enchanter dies.
tooltip.mine_fargo.war_table.text: Right-click to gain 10 minutes of [Strategist] status, increasing summon damage by 5%%
item.confluence.war_table.info: It has a chance to drop when the Ravager dies.
tooltip.mine_fargo.crystal_ball.text: Right-click to gain 10 minutes of [Clairvoyance] status, increasing magic damage by 5%%, and also increasing mana/mana source cap when installed with Iron Magic/Nova Magic
item.confluence.crystal_ball.info: It has a chance to drop when the Witch dies.
tooltip.mine_fargo.arrow_stand.text: Right-click to gain 10 minutes of [Archery] status, increasing ranged & projectile damage by 5%%
tooltip.mine_fargo.sunflower.text: Right-click to gain 10 minutes of [Happiness] status, increasing movement speed by 10%%
tooltip.mine_fargo.ammo_box.text: [TACZ Link] Right-click to gain 10 minutes of [Economy] status, with 20%% chance not to consume ammunition when firing guns
tooltip.mine_fargo.glyph_scribes_table.t: [Nova Magic Link] Right-click to gain 10 minutes of [Mana Source] status, increasing magic damage by 2.5%% and mana source cap by 5%%
tooltip.mine_fargo.arcane_scroll_forge.t: [Iron Magic Link] Right-click to gain 10 minutes of [Arcane] status, increasing magic damage by 2.5%% and maximum mana by 5%%
item.confluence.celestial_onion.tooltip: Permanently increases accessory slots, requires use of Demon Heart
item.confluence.celestial_onion.info: It definitely drops from the Ender Dragon.
tooltip.mine_fargo.neptunes_shell.text: Transform into mermaid when entering water, increasing swimming speed by 50%% and gaining underwater breathing
item.confluence.neptunes_shell.info: Can be found in shipwreck chests.
item.confluence.moon_charm.tooltip: Transform into werewolf at night, slightly boosting attributes
tooltip.mine_fargo.moon_charm.text: Transform into werewolf at night, slightly boosting attributes
item.confluence.moon_charm.info: It has a chance to drop when a Bat dies.
item.confluence.moon_shell.tooltip: Transform into werewolf at night, slightly boosting attributes
tooltip.mine_fargo.discount_card.text: Grants Village Hero I effect, equivalent to 30%% trade discount
tooltip.mine_fargo.lucky_coin.text: 10%% chance to drop 1-10 emeralds when dealing damage
item.confluence.coin_curios.info: Has a small chance to drop when Ravager, Enchanter, Warden, or Ravager dies.
tooltip.mine_fargo.chlorophyte_quiver.te: 50%% chance for fired projectiles to track targets
effect.mine_fargo.ammo_box.description: 20%% chance not to consume a bullet when shooting
effect.mine_fargo.ars_source.description: Each level increases Mana Source cap and magic damage by 5%% and 2.5%% respectively
effect.mine_fargo.iron_arcane.descriptio: Each level increases mana capacity and magic damage by 5%% and 2.5%% respectively
effect.mine_fargo.merfolk.description: Each level grants 50%% swimming speed (only effective in water)
effect.mine_fargo.archery.description: Each level increases projectile damage by 5%%
effect.mine_fargo.honey.description: Each level increases natural life regeneration rate by 0.2 and reduces speed by 10%% (effectively reduces luck by 10%%)
effect.mine_fargo.cozy_fire.description: Each level increases natural life regeneration rate by 0.1
effect.mine_fargo.heart_lamp.description: Each level increases natural life regeneration rate by 0.2
effect.mine_fargo.sharpened.description: Each level increases armor penetration by 12
effect.mine_fargo.sugar_rush.description: Each level increases speed and mining speed by 20%
effect.mine_fargo.clairvoyance.descripti: Each level increases magic damage by 5% (also increases max mana / mana source cap if installed with Iron Magic / Nova Magic)
effect.mine_fargo.strategist.description: Each level increases summon damage by 5%
effect.mine_fargo.bewitched.description: Each level increases summon damage by 5%
effect.mine_fargo.mana_sickness.descript: Reduces Iron Magic spell damage by 25% (if equipped with Chaos Stone, reduces natural life regeneration by 2 points)
tooltip.mine_fargo.gotey_potency_amplifi: When casting with Crystalline, the level of potent effect increases by *[Crystalline potency multiplier] attribute
The final effective level is the integer part, and it is valid only if the Crystalline itself has a level of effect
tooltip.mine_fargo.goety_soul_absorb.tex: Deals damage and recovers [damage amount * Soul Absorption attribute] of soul
In default configuration, at most, it recovers 10%% of the player's current container soul, and does not exceed 75%% of the soul capacity of the container
tooltip.mine_fargo.brewer_hat.text: Drinking brewing or potions has a 10%% chance not to consume brewing
tooltip.mine_fargo.master_brewer_hat.tex: Drinking brewing or potions has a 15%% chance not to consume brewing
tooltip.mine_fargo.dimensional_soul_arti: Damage dealt by the wearer increases by 20%%, while damage taken by the wearer also increases by 15%%
item.confluence.dimensional_soul_artifac: It has a low probability to generate in End City chests.
tooltip.mine_fargo.ars_extensions.text: When installing the [Magic Expansion] mod, you can obtain [Magic Source Flower] accessory series with [Consume Magic Source Berries to Recover Magic Source] ability
tooltip.mine_fargo.curse_injection_stati: [Desolate Witchcraft Linkage] Right-click to gain 10min of [Curse Power] status, Crystalline effect multiplier increases by 25%%, armor value decreases by 20%%
effect.mine_fargo.curse_power.descriptio: Crystalline effect multiplier increases by 50%%, armor value decreases by 20%%
tooltip.mine_fargo.spirit_brooch.text: Even if the main hand does not hold a sickle, kills by the wearer can drop pure soul
tooltip.mine_fargo.spirit_spoils.text: Increases the quantity of pure souls dropped when the wearer kills a creature
item.confluence.ichor.info: It has a chance to drop when wither boss dies.
tooltip.mine_fargo.golden_shower.text: Deals magic damage and applies Spirit Fluid III effect for 10s to the target (compatible with Iron Magic, Rebirth Magic Art)
tooltip.mine_fargo.ichor_arrow.text: When dealing ranged damage, applies Spirit Fluid III effect for 10s to the target (compatible with TACZ)
tooltip.mine_fargo.flask_of_ichor.text: When dealing melee damage, applies Spirit Fluid III effect for 10s to the target
effect.mine_fargo.ichor.description: Reduces target's armor by 5 points per level
tooltip.mine_fargo.ichor.text: Spirit Fluid: Each level reduces target's armor by 5 points
tooltip.mine_fargo.spirit_altar.text: [Spirit Disaster Linkage] Right-click to gain 10min of [Soul Vision] status, increased level of soul drops upon killing creatures
tooltip.mine_fargo.assassin_scope.text: Gains bonus damage based on the time interval since the last shot, reaching 50%% bonus damage at 3 seconds
tooltip.mine_fargo.rapid_fire_scope.text: Gains bonus damage when firing repeatedly, reaching 20%% bonus damage after 10 consecutive shots, bonus resets if no shot within 5 seconds
tooltip.mine_fargo.rover_drive.text: Provides [Tungsten Steel Barrier IV] status, increases armor, and consumes status level to offset damage when hit
tooltip.mine_fargo.rover_drive.text1: §aUnder Tungsten Steel Barrier status, each level provides 2.5 armor and 1 point of damage offset
tooltip.mine_fargo.rover_drive.text2: §2When status is below level 4, the matrix requires 10 seconds to charge, taking damage or removing it during charging will reset the timer
item.confluence.rover_drive.info: It has a probability to drop when an iron golem dies.
effect.mine_fargo.rover_shield.descripti: Each level of the status provides 2.5 armor and 1 point of damage offset
tooltip.mine_fargo.wulfrum_battery.text: Allows the wearer's followers to maintain a glowing state continuously
tooltip.mine_fargo.the_sponge.text: §bProvides [Quantum Foam Barrier X] status, increasing armor, armor toughness, and damage reduction, and consuming status level when hit
tooltip.mine_fargo.the_sponge.text1: Under Quantum Foam Barrier status, each level provides 1.5 armor, 1.5 armor toughness, and 1%% damage reduction, which can offset 1~3.6 damage points
tooltip.mine_fargo.the_sponge.text2: §9When level is below 10, this item needs 9 seconds to charge, after 9 seconds, it recovers 2 levels of status per second. Damage or removal during charging resets the timer.
effect.mine_fargo.the_sponge_shield.desc: Each level provides 1.5 armor and 1.5 armor toughness, and can offset 1~3.6 damage points
item.confluence.deific_amulet.tooltip: Increases invincibility duration after taking damage, with a 50%% longer duration than the Cross Necklace
tooltip.mine_fargo.honey_dew.text: Continuously grants Honey status effect to the wearer
tooltip.mine_fargo.honey_dew.text1: When gaining a non-positive buff, it counts as +0.2 health regeneration
tooltip.mine_fargo.honey_dew.text2: When sneaking, it counts as +0.3 health regeneration
tooltip.mine_fargo.radiant_ooze.text: Increases natural health regeneration based on lost health, providing an extra 0.8hp/s when at or below 20% health
